title: Legal Process Consultant
summary: Codify how the next case type actually moves through court, from constituent elements to stage rules, so DRISTI can be configured for it.
body:
## The role

PUCAR transforms one case type at a time. Cheque dishonour is proven; the next dispute type needs its journey mapped, its rules made explicit, and its edge cases documented before a single line of configuration is written.

[draft description, refine before publishing]

## What you'll do

- Map the end-to-end journey of the next case type, stage by stage
- Write the rulebook: constituent elements, timelines, notice formats, escalations
- Work with judges and registry staff to validate it against courtroom reality

## Who this suits

- Practising or former lawyers with strong procedural knowledge
- Clear, precise writing
- 2 to 3 days a week, flexibly scheduled

## How it works

Paid part-time engagement through a PUCAR collective member organisation, initially for six months.
